allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=[]; function walk\(d\){fs.readdirSync\(d\).forEach\(f=>{const p=d+'/'+f; if\(fs.statSync\(p\).isDirectory\(\)&&!['node_modules','dist','dist-electron','release','.git','build'].includes\(f\)\)walk\(p\); else if\(p.match\(/\\.\(ts|tsx|css|json\)$/\)&&!p.includes\('node_modules'\)\)files.push\(p\)}\)} walk\('.'\); console.log\(files.join\('\\n'\)\)")
